description: CompositionGrey, white and red striped round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves FitSlimWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry cleanDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroideryThis T-shirt from probase is perfect for the alpha male who wants to capture the minimal mood of the moment. This tee is an off-duty essential in every cosmopolitan man's wardrobe. Wear with denims and a jacket for a weekend in the outdoors, style with casual shoes and an understated belt.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
